info.title: Billing App API
info.description: Billing Application API - JWT Secured. Use `/api/v1/auth/login` to get a token, then add header: `Authorization: Bearer {token}`

post.description: Authenticate with username or email and password. Returns JWT token.
Invalidate the current JWT token. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Get the authenticated user's profile. Requires Bearer token.

post.description: Create a new bill/invoice. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Get paginated list of customers. Requires Bearer token.

post.description: Create a new customer. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Get customer summary statistics. Requires Bearer token.
Get customer basic details. Requires Bearer token.

put.description: Update customer details. Requires Bearer token.

delete.description: Delete a customer. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Get invoices for a customer (transaction timeline). Requires Bearer token.
Get net profit for period (T=Today, W=Week, M=Month, Y=Year). Requires Bearer token.
Get total received (payments) for period. Requires Bearer token.
Get income (invoice totals) and expenses for period. Requires Bearer token.
Get items where stock is at or below low stock alert. Requires Bearer token.
Get payment totals grouped by payment method for chart. Requires Bearer token.
Get URLs for New Bill, Add Product, Add Customer. Requires Bearer token.
Total Sales, Paid, Unpaid, Cancelled for period. Requires Bearer token.
Invoice history with pagination. Requires Bearer token.
Invoice detail with line items and payments. Requires Bearer token.

delete.description: Delete a draft invoice. Requires Bearer token.

patch.description: Mark invoice as cancelled. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Get paginated list of products/items. Requires Bearer token.

post.description: Create a new product/item. Requires Bearer token.

get.description: Get stock value and low stock count. Requires Bearer token.
Get product/item details. Requires Bearer token.

put.description: Update product details including price and stock. Requires Bearer token.

delete.description: Delete a product/item. Requires Bearer token.

patch.description: Quick update of stock quantity. Requires Bearer token.
